Every year around this time, people ask me: "Lígia, what's the color of next year? What's the crystal of the year?" Folks, as a chromotherapist and crystallographer, I tell you, the color, the crystal, will depend on your expectations, on what you are thinking and wishing for the coming year.  Your expectations, your desires, your mindset, what you are vibrating, will determine which crystal you access.  Imagine if I told you that the crystal is the same for everyone.  Wow, everyone thinks differently, expectations are different.  So it's pure commerce to say that the crystal of the year is this one crystal and not another.  So, folks, if you're thinking about relationships next year and finding true love or enhancing everything you already have, there's nothing better than working with rose quartz, which works on love, tenderness, and all that.  And also, if you have very low self-esteem and want to feel empowered next year, a pink room can also help with that .  Now, if you're thinking of setting a goal for next year to connect with prosperity and truly resolve many financial situations, then citrine comes into play, as citrine vibrates with joy, enthusiasm, and abundance.  And it has a vibrational frequency that creates a neuro-connection with the power to eliminate limiting beliefs of scarcity and truly bring all that power of prosperity and abundance into your life.  Now, if you're looking to work with things related to health, and also bring more focus and care to the body and everything else, green quartz is important here, but I also like and recommend chrysoprase for this year.  Look at this beautiful stone, the chrysoprase. Chrysoprase, in addition to bringing us a balance of health in terms of homeostasis, the quantum homeostasis of our body, also provides us with more focus and concentration on what we want to accomplish with clarity and discernment.  So, Cristopio is that stone that, besides bringing us [snoring], making us stop procrastinating on those things, those body care routines, will also keep us focused on the mental aspect, on what I want and what I want to achieve.  So, if I 'm in a year where I have many worries, many financial or legal problems to solve, and I'm lacking courage and faith for the coming year, nothing is better than a tiger's eye.  Tiger's eye is the stone that gives us courage, faith, and everything else.  And so on, folks, I could spend hours bringing up, like this stone which is black tourmaline, which works with field cleansing, when I really want to cleanse my life, distance myself from toxic people, change jobs, really change my whole life.  Of course, the Lina Ved Negra group would be very important.  So, considering all of this, what color will we choose for next year?  It will depend on your frequency, your expectations, and the same goes for the crystal aspect.  If you want to know more details and see the full list of crystals, I have a paper that you can find at the link below.  Click here and you will find 30 types of crystals.  How does each frequency vibrate, and how does each crystal connect to an emotion, a feeling, and that which I want to diminish, reduce, or enhance in my life?  Click on the link below and you will have all the material.  This exclusive product will help you and is called Emotions and Crystals. Go ahead, take a look there and then tell me how you find all of this.
